parsed.edit_description: Add a new target 'drain-status' that executes 'python3 scripts/jira-drain.py status' and outputs the current Jira state counts.
parsed.new_content:
#!/bin/bash

# Drain status command
python3 scripts/jira-drain.py status

exit 0
